linkConfig.description: Sign in to grant HelkinSwarm access to your email, calendar, and files

tools.name: outlook_list_emails
tools.description: List recent emails from the user's mailbox. Returns subject, sender, date, preview, and read status. Supports filtering by folder and top N.

externalAutomationCapabilities.action: Inbox rules for automatic sorting, forwarding, and flagging
ML-based priority sorting via Focused Inbox

top.description: Number of emails to retrieve (default: 10, max: 50)

folder.description: Folder name to list from: inbox, sentitems, drafts, archive (default: inbox)

filter.description: OData filter expression, e.g. 'isRead eq false' for unread only

tools.name: outlook_read_email
tools.description: Read the full body of a specific email by its ID. Returns subject, sender, recipients, body, and attachment metadata summary including inline-image CID mapping when available.

tools.name: outlook_list_attachments
tools.description: List attachment metadata for a specific Outlook message, including inline-image detection, content IDs, and whether each attachment is referenced by cid: links in the body.

messageId.description: The Graph API message ID whose attachment metadata should be listed

useWhen: the user wants to inspect an email's attachments before downloading or forwarding one
the user asks whether a message contains inline images or regular file attachments
typicalInputs: message id from a previous email search
tools.returnsSummaryShape: attachment metadata with ids, names, content types, inline flags, content IDs, and cid/body-reference mapping

tools.name: outlook_download_attachment
tools.description: Download a specific Outlook message attachment into HelkinSwarm runtime asset storage so later steps can reference or return it without inlining raw bytes into the prompt.

messageId.description: The Graph API message ID that owns the attachment

attachmentId.description: The Graph API attachment ID to download

useWhen: the user wants to materialize a specific Outlook attachment for later tool steps or chat return
the user wants an inline image or file from an email turned into a reusable runtime asset reference
typicalInputs: message id + attachment id from a prior list step
download the first attachment from the latest matching email
save the inline image from this message
tools.returnsSummaryShape: attachment metadata plus a runtime asset reference compatible with downstream tools and reply attachments

tools.name: outlook_send_email
tools.description: Send an email on behalf of the user. Requires linked account (OBO). Supports plain text or HTML body content, but does not support embedded inline images or file attachments yet. High risk, but manifest-configured to skip extra confirmation for this personal environment.

externalAutomationCapabilities.action: Auto-replies, send-later scheduling, and Quick Parts templates
Webhook notifications on sent item changes

tools.name: outlook_reply_to_latest_email
tools.description: Find the most recent email from a sender and reply in-thread with the provided comment. Use this for requests like 'reply to the latest email from alice@example.com'. High risk, but manifest-configured to skip extra confirmation for this personal environment.

externalAutomationCapabilities.action: Reply within the existing Outlook thread while preserving subject/history

sender.description: Email address or sender string to match, e.g. 'alice@example.com'

replyAll.description: Reply to all recipients instead of only the original sender (default: false)

folder.description: Optional folder to search: inbox, archive, sentitems, drafts

tools.name: outlook_search_emails
tools.description: Search emails across the user's mailbox using KQL (keyword query language). Returns matching messages.

externalAutomationCapabilities.action: Saved search folders for persistent KQL queries

useWhen: the user asks to find or summarize matching messages before taking action
tools.returnsSummaryShape: matching email summaries with ids for follow-up read or reply

tools.name: outlook_list_calendar_events
tools.description: List upcoming calendar events from the user's default calendar. Returns subject, organizer, start/end times, location, and attendees.

endDateTime.description: ISO 8601 end date/time filter (default: 7 days from now)

tools.name: outlook_create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event on behalf of the user. High risk — requires confirmation.

externalAutomationCapabilities.action: FindMeetingTimes API for optimal slot discovery

reminderMinutesBeforeStart.description: Optional reminder offset in minutes before the event starts

isReminderOn.description: Enable or disable the event reminder explicitly (defaults to true when reminderMinutesBeforeStart is provided)

useWhen: the user asks to create, schedule, book, or add a meeting or event to the calendar
the request includes a reminder, attendees, or online meeting preference
typicalInputs: Project sync on Friday at 09:00 with a 15 minute reminder
Book a Teams meeting with alex@example.com
tools.returnsSummaryShape: created calendar event summary with id, time range, attendees, and reminder state

shortDescription: Email and calendar management via Microsoft Graph
orchestratorUseCases: find, read, summarize, reply to, or send email
inspect Outlook attachments and download them into runtime asset storage
inspect upcoming meetings and create calendar events
